title: KZ-1 runners skeleton repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
from pathlib import Path
import ast

root = Path('.')
runners_dir = root / 'governance' / 'runners'
if not runners_dir.exists():
    raise SystemExit('BLOCKED: governance/runners missing')

changed = []
template = '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""KZ-1 restored STUB_RUNNABLE skeleton. Not Release PASS."""
from __future__ import annotations
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Any

RUNNER_ID = "{runner_id}"
READINESS_LEVEL = "STUB_RUNNABLE"

def build_result() -> dict[str, Any]:
    return {{
        "runner_id": RUNNER_ID,
        "readiness_level": READINESS_LEVEL,
        "status": "stub_runnable",
        "release_pass": False,
        "timestamp_utc": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    }}

def main() -> int:
    print(json.dumps(build_result(), ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True))
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
'''

for path in sorted(runners_dir.glob('*.py')):
    text = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
    nonblank = [x for x in text.splitlines() if x.strip()]
    try:
        tree = ast.parse(text)
        has_main = any(isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef) and n.name == 'main' for n in tree.body)
        syntax_ok = True
    except SyntaxError:
        has_main = False
        syntax_ok = False
    has_entry = '__main__' in text
    if (not syntax_ok) or len(nonblank) <= 5 or (not has_main) or (not has_entry):
        path.write_text(template.format(runner_id=path.stem), encoding='utf-8')
        changed.append(str(path))

test_dir = root / 'tests' / 'governance'
test_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
test = test_dir / 'test_kz1_runners_skeleton.py'
test.write_text('''import ast
from pathlib import Path


def test_governance_runners_have_main_and_entrypoint():
    runners = sorted(Path("governance/runners").glob("*.py"))
    assert runners, "governance/runners has no python files"
    broken = []
    for path in runners:
        text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
        try:
            tree = ast.parse(text)
        except SyntaxError as exc:
            broken.append(f"{path}: SyntaxError {exc}")
            continue
        has_main = any(isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef) and n.name == "main" for n in tree.body)
        has_entry = "__main__" in text
        if not has_main or not has_entry:
            broken.append(f"{path}: missing main/__main__")
    assert not broken, "\\n".join(broken)
''', encoding='utf-8')
changed.append(str(test))

ctx = root / 'governance' / 'AGENT_CONTEXT.md'
if ctx.exists():
    with ctx.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n### KZ-1 | RUNNERS SKELETON REPAIR | 2026-06-03 | 10:06 (UTC+3)\n')
        f.write('- Restored truncated governance/runners/*.py files to STUB_RUNNABLE skeleton where required.\n')
        f.write('- Added tests/governance/test_kz1_runners_skeleton.py.\n')
        f.write('- No Release PASS. Next action: KZ-2 SSOT duplicates cleanup.\n')
    changed.append(str(ctx))

if not changed:
    raise SystemExit('BLOCKED: no files changed')
print('\n'.join(changed))
"""
No issue comments.
